title: AgentFactory Part 3: Business Domain Agent Workflows
description: Announcing the definitive guide to enterprise AI agents — where domain experts become the architects of the modern enterprise
targetAudience: Enterprise professionals, AI engineers, C-suite executives
keyPoints: Part 3 focuses exclusively on enterprise business workflows — 16 chapters across 7 business domains
Learn to translate your expertise into SKILL.md libraries — structured knowledge that agents execute
Build production-ready agents for CFO, Legal, Sales, HR, Supply Chain, and Innovation
Implement governance frameworks where AI executes but licensed professionals judge
Platform-agnostic deployment — works with Claude, Gemini, Copilot, and any AI tool
From prototype to production — validated agent configurations ready for organizational use

introduction.hook: Part 1 and Part 2 taught you how to build agents. Now, Part 3 answers the bigger question: What should you build, and why?

body.title: Enterprise Focus
body.content: AgentFactory Part 3 focuses exclusively on enterprise business workflows. Sixteen chapters across seven critical business domains — from the Office of the CFO to Legal Compliance, from Sales Operations to Supply Chain Management.

body.title: Domain Expertise
body.content: Here's the truth: Technical capability is no longer scarce. Domain expertise is. Part 3 teaches you to translate your professional judgment into SKILL.md libraries — structured knowledge that AI agents execute flawlessly.

body.title: Production-Ready
body.content: This isn't about prototypes. You'll build production-ready agents with governance frameworks, compliance guardrails, and MCP connectors for real enterprise systems — ERP, CRM, BI tools.

body.title: Governance & Safety
body.content: The governing principle is simple: AI executes, professionals judge. Licensed professionals make high-consequence decisions — audit opinions, compliance filings, contract strategy. Agents handle the execution.

body.title: Platform Agnostic
body.content: Everything is platform-agnostic. Build once, deploy anywhere — Claude Cowork, Gemini CLI, Microsoft Copilot, OpenAI Codex. Open standards ensure your agents are portable and future-proof.

conclusion.summary: If Part 1 and 2 are for the coders, Part 3 is for the builders of the modern enterprise. Whether you're a CA, lawyer, compliance officer, HR director, or supply chain leader — this is your playbook for the AI-powered future.
conclusion.callToAction: Visit agentfactory.panaversity.org and start building enterprise agents that matter.
